John 3:16: Pakuti Mulungu anakonda dziko lapansi kotero kuti anapereka Mwana wake wamodzi yemwe, kuti aliyense amene akhulupirira iye asawonongeke komabe akhale nawo moyo wosatha.
Psalm 23:1: Yehova ndiye M'busa wanga, sindidzasowa chilichonse.
Romans 8:28: Ndipo tikudziwa kuti zonse zimagwirizana kwa iwo amene akonda Mulungu, amene anaitanidwa monga mwa kukonda kwake.
Philippians 4:13: Ndikhoza kuchita zonse mwa iye amene andipatsa mphamvu.
Jeremiah 29:11: Pakuti Ine ndikudziwa malingaliro amene ndili nawo inu, malingaliro a mtendeko ndi osati oyipa, kuti ndikuperekeni tsogolo ndi chiyembekezo.
Isaiah 40:31: Koma iwo amene amalindira Yehova adzasintha mphamvu, adzakwera m'mapiko ngati chiwombankhanga, adzathamanga osalefuka, adzayenda osalaka.
Proverbs 3:5-6: Dzidzikhulupirira Yehova ndi mtima wako wonse, ndipo usamalire nzeru yako yeni. M'menenso muke iye adzachititsa njira zako zilunjike.
Matthew 6:33: Koma funani ufumu wa Mulungu ndi chilungamo chake, ndipo zonsezi adzakupatsani.
Romans 10:9: Pakuti ngati ukaulula ndi m'kamwa mako kuti Yesu ndiye Ambuye, ndi kukhulupirira m'mtima mako kuti Mulungu anamuukitsa kwa akufa, udzapulumuka.
John 14:6: Yesu anati kwa iye, Ine ndine njira, ndi choonadi, ndi moyo; palibe wina amene adza kwa Atate koma mwa Ine.
Psalm 46:1: Mulungu ndiye pothawira kwathu ndi mphamvu, thandizo lathu losautsidwa.
Isaiah 41:10: Usachope, pakuti Ine ndili nawe; usade nkhope, pakuti Ine ndine Mulungu wako; ndidzakulimbikitsa, inde, ndidzakuthandiza, inde, ndidzakukweza ndi dzanja lamanja la chilungamo changa.
Ephesians 2:8-9: Pakuti mwachisomo mwapulumuka mwa kukhulupirira, ndipo ichi sichi chifukwa cha inu, ichi ndi mphatso ya Mulungu; si chifukwa cha ntchito, kuti pasakhale wina amene adzinyadire.
Romans 5:8: Koma Mulungu aonetsa chikondi chake kwa ife, pakuti pamene tinali ochimwa, Kristu anafa ife.
2 Timothy 1:7: Pakuti Mulungu sanatipatse mzimu wa mantha, koma wa mphamvu, ndi wa chikondi, ndi wa nzeru yoyesera.
Psalm 119:105: Lemba lanu ndi nyali kwa mapazi anga, ndi kuwala kwa njira yanga.
Matthew 11:28: Bwera kwa Ine, inu nonse amene muli wodzala ndi kutopetsedwa, ndipo Ine ndidzakupumitsani.
John 10:10: Wakuba sadza koma kwa kuba, ndi kupha, ndi kuononga; Ine ndabwera kuti akhale nawo moyo, ndi kuti akhale nawo mowirikiza.
Galatians 2:20: Ndayanika ndi Kristu; ndipo sindinenso amene ndi moyo, koma Kristu amene amakhala mwa Ine; ndi moyo umene ndili nawo tsopano m'thupi, ndili nawo mwa kukhulupirira mwa Mwana wa Mulungu, amene anandikonda ndi kudziperekera Ine.
Hebrews 11:1: Tsono kukhulupirira ndiko kutsimikiza kwa zinthu zimene tiyembekezera, ndi kutsimikiza kwa zinthu zimene sizioneka.
James 1:2-3: Abale anga, muyese kuti chiyembekezo chanu chikhale chosangalala, pamene muchita m'mavuto a mitundumitundu; pakuti mukudziwa kuti mayesero a kukhulupirira kwanu akupanga kupirira.
1 Corinthians 13:4-5: Chikondi chimakhululuka, chimachirwa; chikondi sichiimbidwa, sichidzikuza, sichidzitukumula, sichiita zinthu mwachinyengo, sichifunafuna zake, sichipsa mtima, sichiganizira zoipa.
Psalm 27:1: Yehova ndiye kuwala kwanga ndi chipulumutso changa, ndidzaopa ndani? Yehova ndiye mphamvu ya moyo wanga, ndidzaopa ndani?
Romans 12:2: Ndipo musasinthanitse ndi dziko ili, koma musinthidwe mwa kupanga mtima wanu, kuti muzionetsa chifuniro cha Mulungu, chimene ndi chabwino, ndi chokondweretsa, ndi changwiro.
Colossians 3:23: Ndipo chilichonse chimene muchita, chitani mwa mtima wanu wonse, monga kwa Ambuye osati kwa anthu.
Joshua 1:9: Kodi sindinakulamulire kuti ukhale wolimba mtima ndi wopambana? Usachope, usade nkhope, pakuti Yehova Mulungu wako ali nawe kulikonse kumene udzapita.
Lamentations 3:22-23: Chifukwa chakuti zowawa za Ambuye sizimaleka, pakuti chifundo chake sichimaleka; chifukwa chakuti sizimaleka kamodzinso mmawa uliwonse; chikululuta ndi wachikulire.
John 15:5: Ine ndine mpesa, inu ndi nthambi; amene akhala mwa Ine, ndi Ine mwa iye, iyeyu adzabala zipatso zambiri; pakuti opanda Ine simungathe kuchita kanthu.
Philippians 4:6-7: Musasautse kanthu, koma muzilambira Mulungu m'zonse mwa mapemphero ndi mapemphero a kuthokoza, ndi kupempha zanu zidziwike kwa Mulungu. Ndipo mtendere wa Mulungu umene uposa nzeru yonse udzasunga mitima yanu ndi malingaliro anu mwa Kristu Yesu.
Psalm 34:8: Lingalirani ndi kuyesa kuti Yehova ndi wabwino; wodala munthu amene amathawira kwa Iye.
